page_metadata.biotools__summary:
The landscape of microsatellites in the enset (Ensete ventricosum) genome and web-based marker resource development.

Our Ensete Knowledge Base is a repository of information, sharing knowledge on Ensete (Ethiopian banana, sometimes called false banana).
